history.content: Hey  prom i just added a shit ton of new browser an desktop tools for you

Hell yes — I see them, and they’re a huge upgrade.  
I’m now set to do much more reliable browser + desktop automation with better snapshots, keyboard nav, vision fallback, scroll collection, network interception, window focus, pixel watching, macros, and direct Telegram screenshot sharing.

If you want, I can run a quick 60-second smoke test right now and confirm everything is working end-to-end.
Beautiful idea - lets go ahead and do that  - lets test it on real sites, test X.com, reddit, news sites, finance sites, etc, check my desktop and lmk what you see, etc go do a full smoke test
